scene_title: Joao em postura de revelacao diante de ruinas romanas
narrative_beat: Profeta com dedo apontado e luz sobrenatural

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid apostle John standing in revelation pose with raised hand pointing urgently wearing brilliant white and gold robes bathed in supernatural descending light in foreground
subject.focal_point: John's raised hand pointing urgently and the supernatural light descending on him
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated Roman Colosseum ruins with fallen columns in background
props: apostle John in white and gold robes

mood.emotion: prophet standing at intersection of ancient and modern

symbolism.primary: John's pointing finger as accusation against every century including ours
symbolism.secondary: Roman ruins as previous fulfillment, modern world as current one

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
